rag_rules: Place assume/guarantee in component type annexes; use assign only in implementation annexes for output features.
Use visible identifiers from the AADL model exactly as provided; do not invent or copy external names.
generic_rules: Limit contract clauses to the scope of the owning component; do not reference subcomponent paths in type-level annexes.
Express constraints using only named features, constants, or equations visible in the current scope.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use annex agree {** ... **}; for all AGREE declarations.
Declare constants with const name : type = value; and equations with eq name : type = expression;
anti_patterns: Do not embed AADL properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) as AGREE variables unless explicitly exposed as ports or constants.
Never place guarantee statements in implementation annexes unless they bind to assigned outputs.
